name: A Different Meatloaf
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Cheddar cheese, cut into small cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ground beef, beaten egg, cheese cubes, vegetables (onion, green pepper, celery), paprika, black pepper, and seasoned salt in a large bowl.
2. Add milk and breadcrumbs to the mixture. If necessary, add additional milk until the ingredients just barely hold together when formed into a ball with your hands.
3. Form the mixture into an oval shape in a small, open roasting pan.
4. Place slices of bacon on top of the meatloaf.
5. Bake at 450°F for approximately 1 hour, or until the bacon is crispy.
6. Remove the meatloaf to paper towels to drain excess fat before placing it on a serving platter.
